## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      1 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 16, 2026 - Jul 16, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Anonymous User_, Jul 16, 2026, 1/5: "I'm a paid user. I love the app but there are times when it freezes. The freeze happens whenever interacting with habits. I'm experiencing this issue since a very long time. And now I got so frustrated that I'm looking for new Habit Tracker and cancel the subscription."
